title: chloranthus henryi
intro: Chloranthus henryi, also known as the Henry's Chloranthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Chloranthaceae. It is a perennial plant native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Chloranthus henryi is typically prepared as a tea or made into a decoction for use in traditional herbal medicine.
